blended.narrative: Mont-Sauvage (Owl's Head) is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.8 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 208 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.3" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: light rain showers, highs of 54°F.
Saturday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 20°F. Expect powder.
